auth.keyNotProtected: This private key is not protected by a passphrase. For your security, JPassbolt requires a passphrase-protected key. Add a passphrase to your key and try again.
auth.userNotFound: User not found for the provided GPG key.
auth.missingChallengeToken: The server did not return a challenge token (X-GPGAuth-User-Auth-Token header missing).
auth.decryptChallengeFailed: Failed to decrypt the server challenge. Is your passphrase correct?
auth.missingJwt: Authentication completed but no JWT token was returned in the headers.
